About Us

A local team, honest plots, no surprises

Nim's Developers sells and manages land within Nakuru City and its surrounding growth corridors. Every plot we list has been walked, surveyed, and fenced before it goes on the market — what you see on the site visit is exactly what you get on the title.

We work with first-time land buyers, diaspora clients building for the future, and families looking to settle near Nakuru's schools, markets, and main transport routes.

Clean title deeds Flexible instalments Free site visits

Why Buy Here

Why land in Nakuru holds its value

Central Rift Valley location

Nakuru sits at the crossroads of the Rift Valley, with growing demand from residents and investors alike.

Fast-growing residential zones

New estates, schools, and clinics are expanding outward from Nakuru City, lifting demand for nearby plots.

Steady land appreciation

Well-located plots in Nakuru's growth corridors have shown consistent value growth over recent years.

Location & Access

Easy to reach, easy to show

Our plots sit off Nakuru's well-maintained main routes, a short drive from the city centre. Every site visit starts with a pick-up point along the tarmac road, so you can see exactly how accessible your future plot is.

Common Questions

Frequently asked questions

Answers to what buyers usually ask before booking a site visit.

Do the plots have genuine, ready title deeds?

Yes. Every plot we list has an individual title ready for transfer. We encourage every buyer to verify the title at the relevant Lands office before paying a deposit — we'll provide the documents needed for that search.

What is the standard plot size, and can I buy more than one?

Our standard plot size is 50x100 feet. Adjacent plots are available in most sites if you'd like to buy more than one, subject to availability at the time of booking.

Can I pay in instalments?

Yes, we offer flexible instalment plans alongside outright cash purchase. Speak to our team on WhatsApp or phone for the current instalment terms on a specific plot.

Is the site visit really free?

Yes, guided site visits are free of charge. We'll arrange a pick-up point along the main access road and walk you through the plot boundaries in person.

How do I reserve a plot?

Message us on WhatsApp or call our team to pick a plot and book your site visit. Once you're satisfied, a booking deposit secures the plot while the transfer paperwork is processed.

Where exactly are the plots located?

Our sites are within Nakuru City and its growth corridors, off well-maintained main routes. Exact directions are shared once you book a site visit.
